task: Structure SentinelOps Copilot instructions for cacheability and lower always-on context.
quality_check: Both instruction sets must preserve SentinelOps TypeScript rules, incident API guidance, test expectations, and the warning not to invent a new severity scale.
technique: Move volatile content to the end and split path-specific instructions with applyTo so less instruction text loads per turn.
expected: Optimized uses fewer input (↑) tokens and creates a byte-stable prefix that can earn the cached-token discount.
